Ulcer Status of most problematic stasis ulcer. 01 = Fully granulating
02 = Early/partial granulation
03 = Not healing
NA = No observable ulcer/wound CHAR 2 x x
M0482_SURG_WOUND (M0482) Surgical Wound Does patient have a surgical wound? 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0484_NBR_SURGWND (M0484) Number Surgical Wounds Current number of observable surgical wounds. 00 = Zero
01 = one
02 = Two
03 = Three
04 = Four or more CHAR 2 x x
M0486_UNOBS_SRGWND (M0486) Unobservable Surgical Wound Does
